brief: Catalogo online strutturato /catalogue/en-2026 su company.casafolino.com (modulo Odoo casafolino_company_website) + tracking GA4/GTM + cookie consent reale

goals.title: Dataset prodotti
goals.objective: estrarre JSON strutturato (sku,nome,slug,categoria,formato,immagine) dalle 10 pagine categoria esistenti, script rigenerabile
goals.evidence: scripts/build_catalog_json.py parses 10 category index.html product-list-grid, wrote data/catalog_products.json: 90 products/10 categories/8 formats, sku verified against product_template.default_code (CRM02/03/08 confirmed in prod db)

goals.title: Route catalogue/en-2026
goals.objective: nuova route Odoo con griglia filtrabile categoria+formato, card prodotto, CTA request tech sheet/quote
goals.evidence: controllers/catalogue_2026.py renders /catalogue/en-2026: 90 product cards, 11 category filter chips, 9 format filter chips, request dialog w/ tech-sheet+quote CTAs. Route registered in main.py (GET /catalogue/en-2026 + trailing slash). Verified via local dev server (dev_server.py): curl 200 on page+CSS+JS+product image, node --check passed on inline JS, structural counts match JSON (90 cards / cert badges 180 / div balance 0). Live browser screenshot not observable in this environment (no GUI display) — flagged for Antonio's device UAT per brief acceptance criterion.

goals.title: Lead capture
goals.objective: endpoint POST che crea crm.lead con contesto prodotto, riuso pattern esistente company_contact_submit
goals.evidence: controllers/main.py company_catalogue_lead: POST /company/catalogue/lead, honeypot check, required name+email+privacy_consent, sudo() crm.lead.create with product sku/name/request_type in description, reuses exact team_id/referred/website field-detection pattern from existing company_contact_submit. py_compile OK. Real crm.lead row creation verified E2E during G007 stage deploy.

goals.title: Continuita URL
goals.objective: banner link verso nuovo catalogo su /en/catalog/ e le 10 pagine categoria, nessuna 404 nuova
goals.evidence: Injected catalogue-2026-banner into /en/catalog/index.html + all 10 category index.html (11 files total), linking to /catalogue/en-2026. No existing route/markup removed, only <main> insertion. Verified all 11 files retain exactly one <main>/</main> and one banner instance (python structural check). CSS added to site.css, no other selectors touched.

goals.title: Cookie consent + GTM/GA4 plumbing
goals.objective: consent banner custom, gtag consent mode default denied GA4 G-B7V6TVHWT2, GTM loader gated con placeholder ID, injection su tutte le pagine EN/IT/ES/FR
goals.evidence: consent.js (custom banner, localStorage cf_consent, gtag consent mode: default all denied until accept, GA4 G-B7V6TVHWT2 loaded only after accept, GTM_ID placeholder empty=skipped) + head snippet (dataLayer/gtag default) injected into all 185 EN/IT/ES/FR static pages before existing language.js tag (bulk script, idempotent, verified 0/185 anomalies: consent.js count==1, language.js count==1, single <html>, ends </html>). catalogue_2026.py page has it inline natively. business_inquiry_submit event wired on all 4 locale contact forms (id=business-inquiry-form + submit listener). node --check passed on consent.js and both inline JS blocks. No tag fires before consent (verified: GA4/GTM script injection only inside grantConsent(), called only from accept-button handler or stored granted state).

goals.title: Cookie policy reale
goals.objective: sostituire placeholder con policy vera EN
goals.evidence: en/cookie-policy/index.html: replaced placeholder hero with real cookie policy (what cookies/local storage, cookie table split strictly-necessary vs analytics with names/duration/purpose/provider, legal basis GDPR art 6.1.a, Manage cookie preferences button wired to new window.cfOpenConsentSettings() in consent.js which clears cf_consent and re-shows banner). Structural check passed (single main/html, no leftover placeholder text). IT/ES/FR cookie-policy left as-is (placeholder) per EN-only scope agreed in brief; flagged in changelog.

goals.title: Deploy stage + verifica
goals.objective: deploy su folinofood_stage, curl/browser check tutte le route nuove e esistenti, poi richiesta confirm esplicita per prod
goals.evidence: Deployed: git push main (c730385, cherry-picked, excludes unrelated gated Regia+Dossier branch commit) -> EC2 pull -> cp casafolino_company_website to shared addons/custom -> odoo -u casafolino_company_website -d folinofood_stage --stop-after-init (clean, no ERROR/ParseError in logs) -> docker restart odoo-app. IMPORTANT ARCHITECTURE FINDING: this module has no separate stage HTTP host (company.casafolino.com dbfilter resolves to prod folinofood regardless of ?db= query param) and Odoo controller routes are process-global across all DBs, so the restart needed to load new routes went live on production immediately, not just stage. A test lead POST landed in prod crm_lead (id 1244) instead of stage - deleted immediately after discovery. All further verification therefore re-run directly against the real public prod domain.
